name: Bansal wire industries -- SMALL CAP WITH CONSISTENT GROWTH BUT LEADING VOLUME

posts.author: Deepanshu_Jain
posts.community: Bansal wire industries -- SMALL CAP WITH CONSISTENT GROWTH BUT LEADING VOLUME
posts.text: Two more things I found interesting is 3.6x in two year compare to Fy-24 ,their capital work in progress of fy 26 is almost equal to net block of fy-24 (and meanwhile their debt on balance sheet also has shown little reduction during same time despite such capex) Second interesting thing is their industry presence across diversified sectors as shown in the below picture they are supplying their products actress various diversified sectors instead of solely relying on single sector.. Cautious point (Thier trade receivable have grown also too compare to last year and Cyclicalty of the sector is…

posts.author: Saravanan0603
posts.community: Bansal wire industries -- SMALL CAP WITH CONSISTENT GROWTH BUT LEADING VOLUME
posts.text: Hi Folks, FY 26 Top line growth 18.61% YOY Bottom line growth 13% YOY Interestingly this time CFO became positive. If any one has any other view please share
